Our Story

25+ years of freshness, trust & community in Warangal

About Padmavathi Fruits Company & Durga Fruits Agency

Founded in 2001, Padmavathi Fruits Company and Durga Fruits Agency began as a small wholesale fruit shop established by the Mamidala brothers — Anand and Ashok in the heart of Warangal.

Over the years, through dedication and consistent quality, we have grown into one of the most trusted fruit wholesalers in Warangal. We are widely known for offering premium-quality Shimla apples, a wide variety of mangoes, and many other fresh fruits sourced with care.

With 25+ years of experience, our journey has always been driven by humbleness in service, strong customer relationships, and an unwavering commitment to quality.

2001
Started as a small wholesale fruit shop by the Mamidala brothers
2010
Grew into one of Warangal's most trusted wholesale fruit suppliers
2024
Entered the retail market, serving families directly
2026
Launched online fruit delivery — among the first in Warangal to deliver fresh fruits doorstep

What We Offer

Fresh & Quality Fruits

Premium varieties including Shimla apples, seasonal mangoes, and a wide range of fresh fruits.

Wholesale & Retail

Competitive pricing for both bulk wholesale buyers and individual retail customers.

Cold Storage

All fruits are stored in cold storage facilities ensuring longer freshness, better quality & hygienic handling.

Doorstep Delivery

Fresh fruit delivery across Warangal — one of the first to bring this convenience to the city.

Discount Management
Set discounts on fruits & juices — backend computes final price
🔒
Security note: Final price is always computed on the backend. Enter either a discount % OR a flat discount price — the server validates and returns the computed final price. Frontend never calculates or trusts prices.
Password Control
Search users by email or ID · Reset passwords securely via bcrypt · Full audit log

⚠️ Resetting password immediately invalidates all active sessions for this user. Action is logged with your admin ID and timestamp.

Password Change Log

Order Override System
Correct orders in exceptional scenarios — every change is audit-logged & customer notified
⚠️
Admin Override — Use with Caution
Order modifications are irreversible and immediately visible to the customer. The system will:
• Recalculate all totals on the backend
• Send email + push notification to the customer
• Record full audit trail (original values, changes, your admin ID, timestamp)
